title: group.subgroup is undefined if group by is used on an expression involving only constants
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE bar (x int, y varchar(50), z date);
INSERT INTO bar (x, y, z) VALUES (1, 'test', '2023-01-01');
INSERT INTO bar (x, y, z) VALUES (2, 'example', NULL);
SELECT 2 * 2 AS constant_value, COUNT(y) FROM bar GROUP BY constant_value;
SELECT 1 + NULL AS null_value, AVG(x) FROM bar GROUP BY null_value;
key_bug_features: group by on constant expression causes undefined subgroup
